description: v3 = v2-deep trained weights + v3 memory mask architecture
finding: v3 retrain (K=5 per tier × 6 gen) did not beat v2 weights; v2 weights are robust under v3 memory architecture.
method_v3_memory: Per-game stable Bernoulli mask per rank-bucket (big/mid/small cards). Each tier has different recall probabilities — LEVEL_PROFILES.memoryBigCards/MidCards/SmallCards. Mask applied to ctx.seen via perceiveSeen before passing to chooseUnified/mctsLite.
weights_source: v2-deep (run5_gen0 hard, run14_gen3 normal, run4_gen3 easy) — see prior commit 2b15105
